instructions: CRITICAL: Operate on the EXACT file path specified in the objective.
FORBIDDEN: Do NOT modify README.md or any unspecified file.
FORBIDDEN: Do NOT write 'agent output generated' to files - only in commit messages.
FOR 'Create': mkdir -p $(dirname <path>) then write the file.
FOR 'Modify': Read file, parse JSON if needed, change ONLY specified fields, write back.
COMMIT: git add <path> && git commit -m '[test][git] <desc> [agent output generated]'

file-operator.objective: TASK: {{worker.objective}} | Extract: (1) file path, (2) operation type, (3) content/changes. Print them.
TASK: {{worker.objective}} | Execute the file operation. Use mkdir -p for parent dirs.
TASK: {{worker.objective}} | Run: cat <filepath> to verify file exists with correct content.
TASK: {{worker.objective}} | Run: git add <path> && git commit -m '[test][git] <desc> [agent output generated]'
